flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of St Francis fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of St Francis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of St Francis rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (39.8% → 50.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of St Francis fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.7k → $21.1k).
